title: tengine.shadergen.eval.requested v1
description: Native (tengine-private) request contract for the svdag evolve->render->score loop, consumed by scripts/eval_contract/svdag_eval_consumer.py. Splices candidate shader code into a known splice target (currently compute_density), renders SvdagRacing, and answers with tengine.shadergen.eval.completed.v1 (correlated by correlation_id). Mirrors the public funsearch.engine_render.requested.v1 contract but keeps tengine-specific fields (silo, splice_target).

correlation_id.description: Caller-assigned id correlating this request with its eval.completed response.

silo.description: Target silo to render against. Only 'SvdagRacing' is currently accepted; other values are rejected.

candidate_id.description: Identifier of the candidate shader/kernel being evaluated.

splice_target.description: Named splice site the candidate code is injected into (currently only 'compute_density' is known).

candidate_code.description: Candidate shader source to splice and compile.

requested_at.description: RFC3339 UTC timestamp the request was issued.

frame.description: Optional frame budget override for the render/build wait; defaults to the consumer's DEFAULT_FRAME.

camera.description: Optional camera pose override for the render.
